name: Qwen Chat
description: Local Qwen3.5 (vision + text) chat assistant — runs in your browser via wllama

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; object-src 'self'; worker-src 'self'; default-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' data: blob: https://huggingface.co https://*.huggingface.co https://*.hf.co https://*.xethub.hf.co https://raw.githubusercontent.com
